skill.name: longbridge-research
skill.description: Longbridge Research helps analyze stocks, calendars, shareholders, insider activity, short interest, industry peers, investment memos, IPOs, DeFi yields, and on-chain data using Longbridge workflows.
skill.summary: Analyze markets and draft investment research with Longbridge data workflows.
skill.author: longbridge

security_audit.summary: The skill is prompt-only markdown documentation with no executable scripts. Static findings for backtick execution and weak cryptography are false positives caused by markdown inline code, fenced CLI examples, and finance terms. Network-related text is documented WebSearch guidance for data gaps, not hidden exfiltration.

low_findings.title: Markdown Command Examples Misclassified as Execution
low_findings.description: The static analyzer reported Ruby or shell backtick execution across markdown files. Review showed these are inline code spans and fenced examples for Longbridge CLI usage, not code that executes inside the skill.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed locations are markdown documentation and CLI examples. No Ruby files, shell scripts, or executable wrappers are present in the skill.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Alerts Are Finance Text False Positives
low_findings.description: The static analyzer reported weak cryptographic algorithm patterns. Review found no cryptographic implementation; matches occur in ordinary finance documentation, ticker examples, or markdown text.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The files are markdown-only and contain no hashing, encryption, or authentication code. The flagged terms are not used as algorithms.

low_findings.title: Documented WebSearch Fallback Requires User-Aware Network Use
low_findings.description: The skill documents WebSearch fallbacks for DeFi, on-chain, IPO, and market trend data that Longbridge may not provide. This is transparent behavior, but users should know some workflows may query external public sources.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The network behavior is described in user-facing workflow text. I did not find evidence of hidden endpoints, credential transmission, or covert data collection.

content.value_statement: Investment research often requires ratings, forecasts, ownership data, calendars, and structured analysis in one workflow. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through Longbridge research tasks with clear sourcing and output formats.
actual_capabilities: Routes analyst ratings, EPS forecasts, consensus targets, and finance calendar requests to the right Longbridge workflow.
Supports shareholder, fund holder, insider trade, 13F investor, short interest, and short sale volume analysis.
Provides frameworks for investment ideas, proposals, coverage initiation, stock snapshots, thesis tracking, and post-investment monitoring.
Builds company profiles, company tear sheets, competitive analyses, peer comparisons, and industry ranking summaries.
Covers HK IPO analysis, financial planning, DeFi yield analysis, and on-chain analysis with documented source rules.
limitations: The skill is documentation-only and depends on available Longbridge CLI or MCP tools at runtime.
Account-specific workflows, such as holdings or financial planning, may require Longbridge authorization.
DeFi, on-chain, IPO prospectus, and market trend gaps may require WebSearch from public sources.
It provides research and analysis structure, not personalized financial, tax, or legal advice.

use_cases.title: Equity Research Snapshot
use_cases.description: Check a listed company using consensus targets, ratings, financials, valuation, news, and recent price context.

use_cases.title: Investment Committee Memo
use_cases.description: Draft a structured proposal with thesis, valuation, catalysts, risks, peer context, and data gaps.

use_cases.title: Market Event Briefing
use_cases.description: Prepare a calendar-driven briefing for earnings, dividends, IPOs, macro events, and watchlist impacts.

prompt_templates.title: Check Consensus
prompt_templates.prompt: Show the analyst consensus rating, target price range, and EPS forecast trend for NVDA.US.

prompt_templates.title: Review Insider Activity
prompt_templates.prompt: Summarize recent insider trades and major shareholder changes for AAPL.US, and explain what changed.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Stock Snapshot
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a stock research snapshot for 700.HK with consensus, financials, valuation, recent news, and key risks.

prompt_templates.title: Draft Coverage Initiation
prompt_templates.prompt: Write a coverage initiation report for TSLA.US with company overview, industry position, model assumptions, valuation, catalysts, and risks.

output_examples.input: What is the consensus view for TSLA.US?
output: Consensus view: mixed, with rating distribution and target range summarized first.
Estimate trend: EPS and revenue changes are separated by period.
Risk note: highlight data gaps and recent estimate revisions.

output_examples.input: Prepare next week earnings calendar for my watchlist.
output: Timeline grouped by date and market session.
Each event includes ticker, event type, importance, and expected impact.
Account data is used only when authorization is available.

output_examples.input: Compare NVDA.US with its key industry peers.
output: Benchmark table covering growth, margins, valuation, and profitability.
Competitive position summary with moat and vulnerability notes.

best_practices: Provide exact ticker symbols with market suffixes when possible, such as NVDA.US or 700.HK.
Ask for source notes and data gaps when using WebSearch fallback or incomplete Longbridge data.
Use the framework prompts for investment memos, coverage reports, and thesis checks to keep outputs consistent.
anti_patterns: Do not treat model-generated analysis as a buy or sell instruction.
Do not omit missing-data disclosures when source coverage is incomplete.
Do not use third-party data as the default when Longbridge data is available.

faq.question: Does this skill execute code by itself?
faq.answer: No. It is a prompt-only skill made of markdown instructions and reference workflows.

faq.question: Does it require a Longbridge account?
faq.answer: Public market data may not require login, but account-specific holdings and planning workflows may require authorization.

faq.question: Can it analyze insider trades?
faq.answer: Yes. The references cover SEC Form 4 insider trade workflows for US-listed equities.

faq.question: Can it create full investment reports?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes frameworks for proposals, coverage initiation, stock snapshots, and competitive analysis.

faq.question: Why does it mention WebSearch?
faq.answer: Some DeFi, on-chain, IPO, and market trend data may not be available through Longbridge and may need public sources.

faq.question: Is the output financial advice?
faq.answer: No. The skill structures research and highlights risks, but users must make their own investment decisions.
